description_long: This is a freestanding vertical banner with a blue background featuring a herringbone pattern. The front face displays a prominent logo with the text 'Qseg' in large, light-colored letters. The banner is supported by a slim, metallic frame with two horizontal stabilizing feet at the base, ensuring it stands upright. The sides of the banner are extremely narrow, revealing the thinness of the structure and the metallic support. The surface appears smooth and slightly reflective, typical of printed vinyl or coated fabric banners. The overall design is modern and professional, suitable for public or commercial urban environments.
description: A tall, blue, herringbone-patterned vertical banner with a 'Qseg' logo, supported by a slim metal frame and stabilizing feet. The surface is smooth and slightly reflective, giving it a professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue herringbone pattern and 'Qseg' logo, with the full width and stabilizing feet visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the banner and the metallic support structure, with minimal visible surface area.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the same blue herringbone pattern and 'Qseg' logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and metallic frame, mirroring view 1.
